source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/03_제품별 인증서 & 성적서/2. 제품별 성적서/05_Blue/2. EMC/[CR]G1417CW_RF Test report_최종/[CR]G1417CW_RF Test report_300.440 V2.1.1.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: CE test report KES-RF240889 for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector model G1417CW and variants tested to EN 300 440 V2.1.1.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory evidence for RF testing, including transmitter unwanted emissions in the spurious domain and receiver spurious emissions.
keyPoints: Product item is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
Model name is G1417CW with seven listed variant model names.
Test method used is EN 300 440 V2.1.1.
The report states it is not related to KOLAS accreditation.

entities.name: KES Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: KES Co., Ltd.; Test site: KES Co., Ltd.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Client Name : H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Applicant: H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Manufacturer etc. : H&abyz Co., Ltd.

entities.name: KOLAS, Republic of KOREA
entities.evidence: Accredited by KOLAS, Republic of KOREA

concepts.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
concepts.evidence: Product item : Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

concepts.name: Unwanted emissions in the spurious domain
concepts.pageTarget: Unwanted emissions in the spurious domain
concepts.evidence: 3.1.1. Unwanted emissions in the spurious domain

concepts.name: MIMO test configuration
concepts.evidence: It is also supports SISO, but This report was tested only for MIMO at the request of the applicant.

evidence.claim: The document is a CE test report.
The tested product item is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product item : Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The main model name is G1417CW.
Variant model names are G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, and G1717FWP.
evidence.evidenceText: Variant model name : G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, G1717FWP

evidence.claim: The test method used is EN 300 440 V2.1.1.
The overall test result is PASS.
The test date range was 2025.01.01 to 2025.01.06.
The report revision history lists 2025.01.20 as Initial.
The transmitter unwanted emissions in the spurious domain test passed.
evidence.evidenceText: EN 300 440 4.2.4 Unwanted emissions in the spurious domain Pass Note.2
evidence.pageTarget: Unwanted emissions in the spurious domain

evidence.claim: The receiver spurious emission test passed.
Equivalent isotropically radiated power, permitted range of operating frequencies, and duty cycle were not tested.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.2.2 Equivalent isotropically radiated power (e.i.r.p) N/T; 4.2.3 Permitted range of operating frequencies N/T; 4.2.5 Duty Cycle N/T

evidence.claim: The report states the device is equipped with a certified module and references module report EQ740701-11.
evidence.evidenceText: It is equipped with an certified module and please refer to the module report for test results. Module report No. : EQ740701-11

evidence.claim: The device does not support standby mode and was tested in transmission mode.
evidence.evidenceText: This device does not support standby mode, only tested it in the transmission mode.

evidence.claim: The report was tested only for MIMO at the request of the applicant.
evidence.evidenceText: It is also supports SISO, but This report was tested only for MIMO at the request of the applicant.

evidence.claim: The report states it is not related to KOLAS accreditation.
evidence.evidenceText: This test report is not related to KOLAS accreditation.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is ambiguous: the document is labeled CE TEST REPORT and states KES is accredited by KOLAS, Republic of KOREA, but also states this test report is not related to KOLAS accreditation.
Some extracted table text appears to have unit inconsistencies, such as lowest and highest frequency shown as 5 745 kHz and 5 825 kHz while surrounding frequency bands are in MHz.
